title: wetmet iframe intra-frame scroll capture
description: Some wetmet feeds render larger than the card, so the iframe scrolls internally and steals page wheel scroll.
disposition: Tracked in development thread; not in baseline.

title: wetmet streams stall to black after minutes
description: Live wetmet embeds stop and show black; reload/click resumes.
disposition: Root cause = ANOM-001; consider stream-health indicator.

title: Collapse offline streams into an 'Offline Streams (n)' section
description: Hide offline feeds; auto-restore to the grid when they return.

title: 24-hour Central Time clock in the top bar
Per-stream uptime/downtime timer
description: Show uptime for online, downtime since last good frame for offline ('Offline since: forever' if never).
disposition: Raises client-side state persistence question -> see SE-MEMORY / SRS 8.2.

title: Stream-health indicator dot + freeze/desaturate last frame
description: Green pulsing = streaming, solid yellow = stalled; keep last frame, desaturate, resume on hover.

title: Color-code and simplify map pins/tooltips
description: Pins: green pulse=online stream, yellow=still, gray=offline. Tooltip: name, stream type, cardinal direction or PTZ, landmarks; drop raw az/el/fov.

title: Rename cameras by primary landmark with location subtitle
description: e.g. WWT Raceway feed actually shows the STL skyline; put detailed az/el/fov in the popup title bar.

title: Per-camera FOV cone length to primary landmark
description: Extend each cone to its primary landmark distance (manual per camera).

title: Viewshed for elevated cameras
description: Terrain-visibility overlay from camera elevation/FOV against a DEM/DSM.
